scripts.start:wsl: REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME="$(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$nic = Get-NetIPConfiguration | Where-Object { $_.IPv4DefaultGateway -ne $null -and $_.NetAdapter.Status -eq "Up" -and $_.NetAdapter.HardwareInterface -eq $true -and $_.NetAdapter.InterfaceDescription -notmatch "Hyper-V|WSL|Virtual|vEthernet|TAP|Loopback" } | Select-Object -First 1; $nic.IPv4Address.IPAddress' | tr -d '\r')" METRO_LISTEN_ADDRESS=0.0.0.0 EXPO_DEVTOOLS_LISTEN_ADDRESS=0.0.0.0 bunx expo start --dev-client --host lan --port 8081 --clear
